records.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Personality construction complete... Thought process activated... First connection confirmed.../</color>
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Personality construction complete... Thought process activated... First connection confirmed.../</color>
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Personality construction complete... Thought process activated... First connection confirmed.../</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pleasure to meet you. Can you tell who I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pleasure to meet you. Can you tell who I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pleasure to meet you. Can you tell who I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are Shepherd's commander... Edwin Freeheart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are Shepherd's commander... Edwin Freeheart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are Shepherd's commander... Edwin Freeheart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rest until you adjust into your new body. And tell me if it hurts anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rest until you adjust into your new body. And tell me if it hurts anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rest until you adjust into your new body. And tell me if it hurts anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a month-long major surgery. I'm glad it all went well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a month-long major surgery. I'm glad it all went well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a month-long major surgery. I'm glad it all went well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although we failed to restore the memories that were lost, it still is an achievement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although we failed to restore the memories that were lost, it still is an achievement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although we failed to restore the memories that were lost, it still is an achievement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is the restoration of the Bronze Tree going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is the restoration of the Bronze Tree going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is the restoration of the Bronze Tree going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Restoration failed. The Bronze Tree died out after 6 days of carbonizing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Restoration failed. The Bronze Tree died out after 6 days of carbonizing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Restoration failed. The Bronze Tree died out after 6 days of carbonizing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be exact, it's the lifespan of the Bronze Tree that existed in the world that we found reached its end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be exact, it's the lifespan of the Bronze Tree that existed in the world that we found reached its end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be exact, it's the lifespan of the Bronze Tree that existed in the world that we found reached its end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know that the Bronze Tree would wither away as soon as we transferred the Spriggan Factor into Shepherd's heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know that the Bronze Tree would wither away as soon as we transferred the Spriggan Factor into Shepherd's heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know that the Bronze Tree would wither away as soon as we transferred the Spriggan Factor into Shepherd's heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Bronze Tree was already withering away when we discovered it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Bronze Tree was already withering away when we discovered it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Bronze Tree was already withering away when we discovered it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But through Shepherd, it has sprouted new seeds. So there is no need to feel sorry for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But through Shepherd, it has sprouted new seeds. So there is no need to feel sorry for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But through Shepherd, it has sprouted new seeds. So there is no need to feel sorry for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rather, I see it as an improvement. Unlike the tree, Shepherd has cognitive abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rather, I see it as an improvement. Unlike the tree, Shepherd has cognitive abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rather, I see it as an improvement. Unlike the tree, Shepherd has cognitive abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Shepherd is waving her hand at us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Shepherd is waving her hand at us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Shepherd is waving her hand at us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess some of her personality as a child remain intact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess some of her personality as a child remain intact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess some of her personality as a child remain intact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Remain intact</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Remain intact</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Remain intact</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a little skeptical. Is this truly what <color=#ffd34c>we</color> wanted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a little skeptical. Is this truly what <color=#ffd34c>we</color> wanted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a little skeptical. Is this truly what <color=#ffd34c>we</color> wanted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Through this result, <color=#ff3636>our</color> project has not just saved a child's soul, but the rest of humanity as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Through this result, <color=#ff3636>our</color> project has not just saved a child's soul, but the rest of humanity as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Through this result, <color=#ff3636>our</color> project has not just saved a child's soul, but the rest of humanity as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the first in the field to preserve the Spriggan Factor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the first in the field to preserve the Spriggan Factor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the first in the field to preserve the Spriggan Factor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can be proud of that achievement, Dr. Freeheart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can be proud of that achievement, Dr. Freeheart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can be proud of that achievement, Dr. Freeheart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The child's name is Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The child's name is Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The child's name is Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humanity's protector against C.O.s created through the Spriggan Factor synthesis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humanity's protector against C.O.s created through the Spriggan Factor synthesis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humanity's protector against C.O.s created through the Spriggan Factor synthesis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I couldn't get back what was already lost, I thought it was enough... And I took comfort in that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I couldn't get back what was already lost, I thought it was enough... And I took comfort in that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I couldn't get back what was already lost, I thought it was enough... And I took comfort in that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But not long after, I realized that my choice was heading in the wrong direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But not long after, I realized that my choice was heading in the wrong direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But not long after, I realized that my choice was heading in the wrong direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be alarmed, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be alarmed, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be alarmed, Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The easiest way to control C.O.s without intelligence is to imprint fear within them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The easiest way to control C.O.s without intelligence is to imprint fear within them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The easiest way to control C.O.s without intelligence is to imprint fear within them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Make them afraid of you. Give them no choice but to follow you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Make them afraid of you. Give them no choice but to follow you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Make them afraid of you. Give them no choice but to follow you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. just fled like a dog with its tail tucked between its legs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. just fled like a dog with its tail tucked between its legs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. just fled like a dog with its tail tucked between its legs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor, have you ever seen anything like this before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor, have you ever seen anything like this before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor, have you ever seen anything like this before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, this is also my first time seeing it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, this is also my first time seeing it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, this is also my first time seeing it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does this mean that C.O.s actually have emotions?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does this mean that C.O.s actually have emotions?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does this mean that C.O.s actually have emotions?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. But C.O.s don't secrete neurotransmitters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. But C.O.s don't secrete neurotransmitters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. But C.O.s don't secrete neurotransmitters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The emotion Shepherd manipulates can't be explained by modern science alone... It's something more fundamental.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The emotion Shepherd manipulates can't be explained by modern science alone... It's something more fundamental.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The emotion Shepherd manipulates can't be explained by modern science alone... It's something more fundamental.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean, like souls?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean, like souls?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean, like souls?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Perhaps. I used to vaguely believe in such stuff when I was a believer, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Perhaps. I used to vaguely believe in such stuff when I was a believer, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Perhaps. I used to vaguely believe in such stuff when I was a believer, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did well, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did well, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did well, Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, good job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, good job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, good job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look. The ice is so big.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look. The ice is so big.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look. The ice is so big.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad you like it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad you like it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you like it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are kind, commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are kind, commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are kind, commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person... dear to Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person... dear to Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person... dear to Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A long and inefficient title.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A long and inefficient title.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A long and inefficient title.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... I guess you're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... I guess you're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... I guess you're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd likes it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd likes it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd likes it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the first time seeing in with my eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did well, Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did well, Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did well, Shepherd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. The black monster. It ran away when Shepherd did as the adults said.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, good job.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, good job.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, good job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But fear is a bad emotion. So you shouldn't imprint it on people, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Then because Shepherd gave something bad to the black monster, Shepherd and it can't become friends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?
root.m_Talk_DEU: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?
root.m_Talk_FRA: For your hard work, I'll give you a reward. Is there anything that you want?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to go somewhere cold to eat ice and play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, right, Ivana? Could you open the medical bay's freezer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... All right. But D Wing needs maintenance as radio waves aren't working properly there. So don't stay in there for too long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd is fine staying in the refrigerator for a long time. Shepherd can't catch colds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You might be okay, but the doctor will catch a cold, so no.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... We'll be back before you know it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look. The ice is so big.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look. The ice is so big.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look. The ice is so big.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad you like it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad you like it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you like it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since you like ice so much, I prepared this big one especially for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are kind, commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are kind, commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are kind, commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know you don't have to be strict with titles when it's just us two.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Strict? Commander, then what should Shepherd call you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about, <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The person... dear to Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The person... dear to Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The person... dear to Shepherd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A long and inefficient title.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A long and inefficient title.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A long and inefficient title.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... I guess you're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... I guess you're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... I guess you're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd likes it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd likes it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd likes it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calling you that makes Shepherd's heart go pitter-patter. It feels good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. If you like it, then I like it too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...?!
